description: You are a constellation architect at an Earth observation startup ('TerraScan Inc.'). Using the specifications in ~/Desktop/constellation_pdr.txt, model a Walker-Delta 6/3/1 constellation at 700 km sun-synchronous altitude in GMAT. Propagate the six satellites (TS_1A, TS_1B, TS_2A, TS_2B, TS_3A, TS_3B) for one full orbital period using an Earth point mass and J2 propagator. Save the resulting GMAT script to ~/GMAT_output/walker_constellation.script and produce a geometry verification report at ~/GMAT_output/constellation_report.txt. The report must document the final SMA, ECC, INC, RAAN, and TA for each satellite, the calculated orbital period in minutes, and the '6/3/1' notation. Login: username=ga, password=password123
